item.title: AWS CloudWatch
item.description: AWS CloudWatch AWS CloudWatch is a monitoring and observability service that provides actionable insights for applications, system performance, and infrastructure resources. 🔹 Key Features Metrics Collection Collects and tracks metrics from AWS services, applications, and custom sources. Logs Monitoring Ingests, stores, and analyzes logs from applications, Lambda, EC2, and other services. Alarms Set thresholds on metrics to trigger notifications or automated actions. Dashboards Create custom, real-time dashboards for visibility into system performance.
